subcodes.first_line: O pure Lord! Grant Thy confirmation and bestow Thy grace, that we may forget both stranger and kin, and fall silent from every mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک يزدانا تأييدی بخش و توفيقی فرما تا بيگانه و خويش فراموش کنيم و از هر ذکری خاموش گرديم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @being a source of light; guidance, @prayer for service, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
